home.title: MUERA — Perfect Fit. Without Complexity.
home.description: MUERA by Mueller Bespoke. Made-to-measure suits, configured online and crafted with precision. Premium fabrics and transparent pricing.
home.heroSub: Made-to-measure suits, configured online and crafted with precision.
home.processStep1Text: Choose your fabric, fit and details online.
home.processStep2Text: Get measured via partner or guided instructions.
home.processStep3Text: Your suit is crafted and delivered within weeks.
home.trustDesc: Behind MUERA stands Mueller Bespoke — combining traditional tailoring expertise with a modern digital experience.
home.trustCard1Text: Our digital process ensures a precise fit without the traditional friction.
home.trustCard2Text: Only the finest materials, selected and crafted with uncompromising standards.
home.trustCard3Text: No hidden costs. You know exactly what you pay for before you commit.
home.ctaText: Create your personalized suit in minutes.
home.heroImageAlt: Man in a perfectly tailored MUERA suit
home.valueImageAlt: MUERA by Mueller Bespoke — suit interior label

shop.title: Shop
shop.description: Browse our collection of premium made-to-measure suits and accessories.
shop.heroText: Premium made-to-measure suits and accessories. Select any suit to configure with our 3D tool.
shop.bannerText: Skip the catalogue. Use our 3D configurator to design your suit from scratch.

product.configuratorCardText: Choose your exact fabric, lapel shape, lining, buttons and more — fully visualised in 3D before you order.
product.deliveryReturnsText: Made-to-order items: {deliveryTime}. Standard items ship within 5–7 business days. Returns accepted within 14 days of delivery on unaltered items. Made-to-measure garments are non-refundable but we will always work to get the fit right.

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.processingConfigText: Please wait while we add your 3D fitted suit to the cart.
cart.emptyText: Explore our collection to find your perfect suit.
cart.freeShipping: ✓ Free shipping on orders over CHF 500

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.securedByStripe: Secured by Stripe. We never store your card details.
checkout.twintRedirect: You will be redirected to TWINT after clicking Place Order.
checkout.invoiceText: Payment by invoice is available for orders under CHF 3,000. An invoice will be sent to your email within 24 hours of order confirmation. Payment due within 30 days.
checkout.agreement: By placing your order you agree to our {privacyPolicy} and {termsOfService}.

confirmation.title: Order confirmed
confirmation.heading: Thank you for your order.
confirmation.confirmationText: A confirmation email has been sent to your address. Your suit is now in production. We will notify you when it ships.
confirmation.step1Desc: You will receive an email with your order details.
confirmation.step2Desc: Your garment enters our tailoring process.
confirmation.step3Desc: Each piece is inspected before dispatch.
confirmation.step4Desc: Shipped and tracked to your address.

about.title: About
about.description: MUERA redefines made-to-measure tailoring — simplifying the process without compromising quality. Learn about our story and Mueller Bespoke heritage.
about.heroText: MUERA redefines made-to-measure tailoring — simplifying the process without compromising quality.
about.storyPara1: Traditional tailoring is often complex and time-consuming. Long appointments, uncertain timelines, and opaque pricing create friction that discourages many from ever experiencing a truly perfect fit.
about.storyPara2: MUERA was created to remove that friction — maintaining precision and quality while making the process accessible, transparent, and entirely digital.
about.storyPara3: Every suit crafted through MUERA is made by Mueller Bespoke — a house built on decades of tailoring experience, precision, and an unwavering commitment to quality.
about.storyPara4: We combine that deep craft tradition with a carefully designed digital process, so you receive a suit that feels entirely personal without the complexity of a traditional atelier.
about.quote:
“Luxury is not about loudness.
It is about the quiet confidence of a perfect fit.”
about.philosophyTitle: Three principles that guide everything we do
about.philosophy1Text: We remove every step that does not add value. What remains is pure craft.
about.philosophy2Text: From the first measurement to the final stitch, we maintain uncompromising standards.
about.philosophy3Text: A MUERA suit is made to be worn — not just admired. Refined, functional, timeless.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with MUERA. We are here to assist you with your made-to-measure suit. Email us at info@muera.ch.
contact.heroText: We are here to assist you.
contact.ctaText: Skip the wait — configure your suit online in minutes.

blog.heroText: Explore our thoughts on made-to-measure tailoring, styling advice, and the philosophy behind MUERA.

configurator.title: Configurator
configurator.description: Configure your MUERA made-to-measure suit. Choose your fabric, fit and details — then get measured and receive your perfect suit.
configurator.heroText: You will be redirected to our external configurator, powered by Mirrorsize 3D technology.
configurator.reassuranceText: The configurator guides you through fabric, fit and style choices. Once complete, we guide you through measurement — then your suit is crafted and delivered within a few weeks.

configuratorStudio.title: 3D Configurator Studio
configuratorStudio.description: Customize your perfect suit with our 3D configurator.

configuratorSuccess.errorGeneric: An error occurred while fetching details.
